ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Accrual_Method__c , 'Set Number of Days'),
ISBLANK( leaseworks__Accrual_Days_Basis__c )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Deferred Basis is required if Deferred Revenue Method is Fixed Number of Days. Please enter value for Deferred Basis.
